allow: PowerShell($dir = "D:\\Projects\\Booking\\backend\\node_modules\\.prisma\\client"; if \(Test-Path $dir\) { Get-ChildItem $dir -Recurse | Remove-Item -Force -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Cleared $dir" } else { "Dir does not exist" })

PowerShell($pkg = Get-Content "d:\\Projects\\Booking\\backend\\package.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "--- prisma block ---"; $pkg.prisma | ConvertTo-Json; "--- seed script in scripts ---"; $pkg.scripts | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($body = @{ email = 'admin@bookingdeo.com'; password = 'demo1234' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' -ErrorAction Stop; "SUCCESS"; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 } catch { "STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; if \($_.ErrorDetails\) { $_.ErrorDetails.Message } else { $_.Exception.Message } })
